actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Thousands of people have taken part in the annual St Patrick's Day parade in London.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died after he was hit by a car while trying to divert traffic away from an earlier accident.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A burst water main has caused a sinkhole to open up in a Greater Manchester road.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Polling stations are open from 07:00 to 22:00 BST on Thursday, with 4,285,323 people - 97% of the electorate - registered to vote.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police have released a CCTV image of a man they want to speak to after a 22-year-old man was assaulted in Glasgow city centre.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Accrington Stanley have signed striker Boco Asamoah from Portsmouth on a two-year deal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has appeared in court charged with attempted murder after two brothers were stabbed in Edinburgh.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police are appealing for information after thieves stole an ATM from a filling station in Essex.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Hughie Fury, the cousin of former world heavyweight champion Tyson Fury, has been ruled out of his world title fight against Joseph Parker in New Zealand on 6 May.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: England's Chris Paxton and Scotland's Gordon Reid will contest the final of the men's wheelchair doubles at the British Open in Norfolk on Sunday.
